pages.title: Adamantium
pages.text: You can block using the katanas.$(br)When an katana is hit while blocking all katanas wil go on a cooldown for 6 seconds.$(br2)When you stop blocking all katanas will fo on cooldown for 2 seconds.
When the mod $(l:https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)better combat$(/l) is installed. the katanas will be recognised as an 2 handed katana.
